mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.title, f.author_id, f.author_name, f.created_at, f.views, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.archive_file af WHERE af.board_id = f.id) AS file_count, (SELECT original_name FROM vibe.archive_file WHERE board_id = f.id AND ROWNUM = 1) AS first_file_name FROM vibe.boards f WHERE f.board_type = 'FAQ' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibe.boards (id, board_type, title, content, author_id, author_name, created_at, views) VALUES (#{id}, 'FAQ', #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE vibe.boards SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
